description: Guarded mutating deployed testnet journey: publishes verifier-owned bytes through PublishedData, waits for inclusion, and asserts the deployed indexer PublishedData API serves the active bytes by CID/dataId.

data.guardPolicy: Requires COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ENABLE_TESTNET_SMOKE=1, COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ENABLE_TESTNET_MUTATION=1, COMMONALITY_TESTNET_RPC_URL, and COMMONALITY_TESTNET_VERIFIER_PRIVATE_KEY before publishing verifier-owned bytes through PublishedData on deployed testnet.
